meta.title: Clairo — Understand any contract. In any language. Instantly.
meta.description: Clairo explains what your contract says in plain language. Not legal advice — clear understanding.

trust.heading: Before we start
trust.subheading: Here's how Clairo handles your document

privacy.title: Processed in memory only
privacy.body: Your document is never saved to disk. It is deleted from memory the moment analysis is complete.

deletion.title: Deleted immediately
deletion.body: No copy of your document is ever stored in our database, logs, or cache. Ever.

explain.title: Explanation, not legal advice
explain.body: Clairo helps you understand your contract in plain language. It does not give legal advice. Always consult a lawyer for legal decisions.

trust.checkbox_label: I have read and agree to the <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.
trust.links_hint: Links open in a new tab
trust.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
trust.legal_note: ⚠️ LEGAL DISCLAIMER: Clairo is not a law firm and does not provide legal advice. Analysis is for informational purposes only.

upload.drag_or_tap: Drag a file here, or tap to select
upload.accepted_types: PDF, DOCX, JPG, PNG, HEIC · Max 25 MB
upload.options_label: Or choose another way to upload
upload.camera_label: Open camera to photograph a document
upload.gallery_label: Choose a photo from your gallery
upload.privacy_reminder: Your document is never stored. Analysed in memory and deleted immediately.

error.type: File type not supported. Please use PDF, DOCX, JPG, PNG, or HEIC.
error.size: File is too large. Maximum size is 25 MB.

upload.offline_message: You're offline. Analysing a new document needs a connection — your saved analyses are still available on the dashboard.

disclaimer.heading: Not legal advice.
disclaimer.body: Clairo explains what your contract says in plain language. It does not give legal advice and cannot tell you whether to sign. For legal decisions, consult a qualified lawyer.
disclaimer.label: Legal disclaimer
disclaimer.upload: Clairo explains contracts in plain language. It is not legal advice. Your document is processed in memory and never stored.

errors.404Message: The page you are looking for does not exist.
errors.500Message: We encountered an error. Your document was not stored.

issue.too_dark: Too dark — move to better lighting

error.permission_hint: Allow camera access in your browser settings to take photos.

review.heading: Review Your Document
review.subheading: Verify the text extracted from "{filename}" before analysis. Tap any word to correct it.
review.empty_page: No text detected on this page.

warning.low_words: {count} word(s) could not be read clearly — please verify.
warning.number_words: {count} number(s) or amount(s) detected — always verify these carefully.

review.confirm_label: I have reviewed and confirmed the text above is accurate before proceeding to analysis.
review.confirm_hint: You must confirm the text is correct before continuing.

language_mismatch.heading: Language mismatch detected
language_mismatch.body: We detected your document is in {detected}, but you selected {selected}. Which would you like to use?

language_selection.heading: Set language context
language_selection.subheading: Tell us about your document so we explain it in the right legal context.

country.label: Country
country.tooltip: Sets the legal context — contract norms vary significantly by country.

confidence.high: High confidence — this language and country pair is well supported
confidence.medium: Medium confidence — results may vary for this combination

language_selection.cta_hint: All three fields required to continue

processing.encouragement: Taking a little longer than usual — almost there
processing.privacy: Processed securely. Your document is deleted when analysis is complete.

cancel_dialog.heading: Cancel analysis?
cancel_dialog.body: Your document will be deleted immediately and the analysis will stop.

prohibited.heading: We can't analyse this document

reasons.court_order: Court orders, judgments, and legal proceedings require professional legal representation. Automated analysis of these documents could cause serious harm.
reasons.immigration: Immigration documents have life-changing legal consequences. Please seek help from a qualified immigration lawyer or authorised organisation.
reasons.medical_consent: Medical consent forms involve complex legal and ethical considerations that require professional medical and legal advice.
reasons.financial_instrument: Financial instruments such as securities, derivatives, and loan agreements require regulated financial advice.
reasons.minor_involved: Documents involving minors require specialist legal advice to protect the child's best interests.
reasons.default: This type of document requires specialist professional advice that Clairo cannot provide.

prohibited.referral_link_aria: Get help from {org} (opens in new tab)
prohibited.no_partial_analysis: No analysis has been performed and no quota has been used.

number_verification.heading: Verify this number
number_verification.source_aria: Original text from your document containing this number
number_verification.warning_body: OCR can mis-read numbers from scanned documents. Always check this number in your original document before relying on it.
number_verification.tap_aria: Tap to verify the number {value} against the original document

share.heading: Share this analysis
share.link_error: Couldn't create a share link. Please try again.

professional.heading: Want a second opinion?
professional.body: Clairo explains your contract, but it isn't legal advice. A qualified professional can review your specific situation.

upgrade.message: Unlock unlimited clause analysis and saved documents.

pricingPage.heading: Simple, transparent pricing
pricingPage.subheading: Understand any contract, in your language. Choose the plan that fits how often you need Clairo.

free.name: Free
free.description: Try Clairo with two analyses, on us.

team.name: Team
team.description: For small teams reviewing contracts together.

pricingPage.not_legal_advice: Clairo explains contracts in plain language — it is not a substitute for professional legal advice.

upgrade_banner.heading: You've used all your free analyses
upgrade_banner.body: Upgrade to keep analysing contracts without limits.

upgraded_banner.heading: You're all set!
upgraded_banner.body: Your subscription has been upgraded successfully.

empty.heading: No analyses yet
empty.body: Upload a contract to get your first plain-language explanation.

no_results.heading: No matches
no_results.body: Try a different search term or filter.

offline.cached_banner: You're offline — showing your saved analyses from {date}.
offline.offline_banner: You're offline. Some content may be unavailable.

subscription.heading: Subscription
subscription.pending_cancellation_with_date: Your subscription is set to cancel on {date}. You keep full access until then.
subscription.pending_cancellation: Your subscription is set to cancel at the end of the current billing period. You keep full access until then.

cancel_dialog.heading: Cancel subscription?
cancel_dialog.body_with_date: Your plan stays active until {date} — you've already paid for this period, so you keep full access until then. After that you'll move to the free plan. You can reactivate any time before that date.
cancel_dialog.body: Your plan stays active until the end of the current billing period — you keep full access until then. After that you'll move to the free plan. You can reactivate any time before then.

referrals.heading: Invite friends
referrals.body: Share your link. When a friend signs up and completes their first analysis, you both get 1 bonus analysis — up to 10 bonuses.

export.heading: Export your data
export.body: Download a copy of everything Clairo has stored about your account.

danger_zone.heading: Delete account
danger_zone.body: This permanently deletes your account, subscription, and analysis history. This cannot be undone.

delete_dialog.heading: Delete your account?
delete_dialog.body: This will permanently delete your account, subscription, and all analysis history within seconds. This cannot be undone.
delete_dialog.confirm_aria: Type DELETE to confirm account deletion

offline.heading: Offline copies
offline.body: Your 10 most recent analyses are kept on this device so you can reread them without a connection. Clearing removes them from this device only.

unavailable.heading: This link is no longer available
unavailable.body: Shared analyses expire after 30 days, or the person who shared this may have removed it. You can analyse your own contract in minutes.

consentBanner.body: We use privacy-friendly analytics to understand how Clairo is used — anonymous only, never your documents. Analytics runs only if you accept.

hero.headline: Understand any contract. In any language.
hero.subheadline: Clairo explains rental, job, and freelance contracts in plain words — in the language you actually think in.
hero.cta_hint: Free — no card needed. 2 free analyses.

upload.title: Upload
upload.body: Photo, PDF, or DOCX — snap your contract with your phone.

review.title: Review
review.body: Check the extracted text; fix anything the scan misread.

understand.title: Understand
understand.body: Every clause explained in plain language, flags on the risky ones.

renter.title: Signing a lease
renter.body: Deposits, notice periods, renovation clauses — know what you're agreeing to before you sign.

job_switcher.title: Changing jobs
job_switcher.body: Non-competes, probation, overtime rules — understand your offer, not just the salary.

expat.title: New country, new language
expat.body: Contracts in a language you're still learning? Read them in the one you know best.

languages.heading: From the contract's language to yours
languages.subtext: German, English, French, Spanish, Portuguese, Hindi, Urdu, Arabic

footer.disclaimer: Clairo explains contracts in plain language. It is not legal advice.

not_found.heading: Page not found
not_found.body: That page doesn't exist — maybe the link was mistyped or has moved. Your contract is one tap away, though.

server_error.heading: Sorry — something went wrong
server_error.body: An unexpected error happened on our side. Please try again in a moment.
server_error.not_stored: Your document was not stored — Clairo never keeps document content, including when errors happen.

install.heading: Add Clairo to your home screen
install.body: Faster access, and your analyses readable offline.

quota.heading: You've used your free analyses
quota.body: Upgrade to keep analysing contracts without limits — or earn bonus analyses by inviting friends.

error.heading: Something went wrong
error.body: We couldn't process your document. Your document was not stored. Please try again.
